---
title: "Corrige Data Camp"
author: "Andrés David Noza Mico"
date: "2026-04-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
puntuaciones <- list.files(path=".", pattern = "\\.txt$", full.names = F, recursive = T)

justificantes <- list.files(path=".",pattern = "\\.pdf$", full.names = F, recursive = TRUE)

puntuaciones
```

```{r}

informacion <- strsplit(puntuaciones,split = "/", fixed = T)
informacion
```
